Recommended values of standard frequencies for applications including the practical realization of the metre and secondary representations of the second

Iodine (
λ
≈ 543 ⁢
nm
ii(lambda) ~~ 543 "unitsml(nm)")
Part 2.10
Appendix 2
Le système international d’unités
Valeurs recommandées des fréquences étalons destinées à la mise en pratique de la définition du mètre et aux représentations secondaires de la seconde

Iodine (
λ
≈ 543 ⁢
nm
ii(lambda) ~~ 543 "unitsml(nm)")
Partie 2.10
Appendice 2

FRANCE

p.strong: Absorbing molecule 127I2, b10 component, R(106) 28-0 transition

fn.p:
All transitions in I2 refer to the
B 3
Π
0 u +
−
X 1
Σ g +
"B"^3Pi" "0_u^+ - "X"^1" "Sigma_g^+ system.

clause.title: CIPM recommended values
clause.p:
with a relative standard uncertainty of
4.5 ×
10
− 11
4.5 xx 10^(-11) apply to the radiation of a laser stabilized to an external iodine cell and subject to the following conditions:

li.p:
cold point temperature
( 0 ± 2 )
⁢
°C
(0 +- 2) "unitsml(degC)"
For the specification of operating conditions, such as temperature, modulation width and laser power, the symbols
±
pm refer to a tolerance, not an uncertainty. ;

clause.title: Source data
clause.p:
Given the small number of calibrations and the individual behaviour of participating lasers in this calibration, the CCL considered it prudent to adopt an uncertainty of
25 ⁢
kHz
25 "unitsml(kHz)" for the recommended value. The final CCL value chosen was
f = 551580162400
( 25 )
⁢
kHz
f = 551580162400(25) "unitsml(kHz)" with the following operating conditions:

li.p:
cold point temperature
( 0 ± 2 )
⁢
°C
(0 +- 2) "unitsml(degC)"
For the specification of operating conditions, such as temperature, modulation width and laser power, the symbols
±
pm refer to a tolerance, not an uncertainty. ;

clause.p: It was felt appropriate not to define the laser type.

clause.title: Absolute frequency of the other transitions related to those adopted as recommended and frequency intervals between transitions and hyperfine components
clause.p: These tables replace those published in BIPM Com. Cons. Long., 2001, 10, 182-183 and Metrologia, 2003, 40, 126.
The notation for the transitions and the components is that used in the source references. The values adopted for the frequency intervals are the weighted means of the values given in the references.
For the uncertainties, account has been taken of:

li.p: the uncertainties given by the authors;
the spread in the different determinations of a single component;
the effect of any perturbing components;
the difference between the calculated and the measured values.

clause.p:
In the tables, uc represents the estimated combined standard uncertainty (
1
σ
1 ii(sigma) ).
All transitions in molecular iodine refer to the B-X system.

bibitem.formattedref:
Ma L.-S., Picard S., Zucco M., Chartier J.-M., Robertsson L., Balling P., Kren P., Qian J., Liu Z., Shi C., Viliesid Alonso M., Xu G., Tan S. L., Nyholm K., Henningsen J., Hald J., Windeler R., Absolute Frequency Measurement of the b10 component of the R(106) 28-0 Transition in 127I2 at
λ
= 543 ⁢
nm
ii(lambda)=543 "unitsml(nm)", provisionally published in Rapport BIPM-2004/16.
Recommendation CCL 2c (BIPM Com. Cons. Long., 11th Meeting, 2003) adopted by the Comité International des Poids et Mesures at its 92nd Meeting as Recommendation 1 (CI-2003).

Chartier J.-M., Hall J. L., Gläser M., Identification of the I2-saturated absorption lines excited at
543 ⁢
nm
543 "unitsml(nm)" with the external beam of the green He-Ne Laser, Proc. CPEM’86, 1986, 323.
Gläser M., Hyperfine Components of Iodine for Optical Frequency Standards PTB-Bericht, 1987, PTB-Opt-25.

Chartier J.-M., Fredin-Picard S., Robertsson L., Frequency-Stabilized
543 ⁢
nm
543 "unitsml(nm)" He-Ne Laser Systems: A New Candidate for the Realization of the Metre ?, Opt. Commun., 1989, 74, 87-92.

Simonsen H., Poulsen O., Frequency Stabilization of an Internal Mirror He-Ne Laser at
543.5 ⁢
nm
543.5 "unitsml(nm)" to I2-Saturated Absorptions, Appl. Phys. B, 1990, 50, 7-12.

Fredin-Picard S., Razet A., On the hyperfine structure of 127I2 lines at the
543 ⁢
nm
543 "unitsml(nm)" wavelength of the He-Ne laser, Opt. Commun., 1990, 78, 149-152.

Lin T., Liu Y.-W., Cheng W.-Y., Shy J.-T., Iodine-stabilized
543 ⁢
nm
543 "unitsml(nm)" He-Ne Lasers, Opt. Commun., 1994, 107, 389-394.

Simonsen H.R., Brand U., Riehle F., International Comparison of Two Iodine-stabilized He-Ne Lasers at
λ
= 543 ⁢
nm
ii(lambda) = 543 "unitsml(nm)", Metrologia, 1994/95, 31, 341-347.
